zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Langford of Grafton於1500年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉黑維可時，她的父親Sir John Langford36歲，母親Katherine Norreys19歲。她和William Stafford至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1533年在她的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Langford of Grafton于1500年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉黑維可时，她的父亲Sir John Langford36岁，母亲Katherine Norreys19岁。她和William Stafford至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1533年在她的家乡享年34岁，埋葬在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Langford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Langford (Bedfordshire, Nottinghamshire, Essex, Norfolk).

variants.name: Lankford
meanings: English: apparently a variant of   Langford  .

variants.name: Langfitt
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Langford  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Grafton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so named from Old English grāf ‘grove’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Langford of Grafton was born in 1500, in Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir John Langford, was 36 and her mother, Katherine Norreys, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with William Stafford. She died about 1533, in her hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Chelmsford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Langford of Grafton est née en 1500, à Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Langford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Katherine Norreys, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec William Stafford. Elle est décédée environ 1533, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Langford of Grafton 1500 in Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Langford 36 und ihre Mutter Katherine Norreys 19. Sie hatte mit William Stafford mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1533 im Alter von 34 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Chelmsford, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Langford of Grafton è nata il nel 1500 nel Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Langford, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Katherine Norreys, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con William Stafford. Morì circa 1533, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Chelmsford, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Langford of Graftonが1500年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラスアーウイクで生まれた時，父Sir John Langfordは36歳，母Katherine Norreysは19歳であった。彼女はWilliam Staffordとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1533年に故郷で34歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Langford of Grafton(이)가 1500년 영국 노르섬프토실르 블래더w이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Langford(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Norreys(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 William Stafford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1533년 그녀의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Langford of Grafton nasceu em 1500, em Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Langford, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Norreys, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com William Stafford. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1533, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Langford of Grafton родилась в 1500 г. в местности блатирвикк, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Langford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Norreys, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от William Stafford. Она умерла около 1533 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Langford of Grafton nació en 1500, en Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Langford, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Katherine Norreys, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con William Stafford. Murió aproximadamente 1533, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra.
